title: retama raetam subsp. raetam
intro: Retama raetam subsp. raetam, also known as the Desert broom or Raetam tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the arid regions of North Africa and the Middle East. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Retama raetam subsp. raetam include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help regulate blood sugar levels. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in the form of poultices and topical creams to treat various skin and wound conditions.
